data.title: SC2 fix: absent-script fallthrough routes to Layer 2, not Layer 3
data.description:
## Context
SC2 specifies: When ticket-clarity-check.sh is absent, sprint falls through to Layer 2.
Current behavior: all failure modes (absent/error) route to Layer 3.

## Changes
1. In SKILL.md Phase 1 Clarity Gate Layer 1, distinguish exit 2 (error/absent) → Layer 2 from exit 1 (heuristic fail) → Layer 3
2. Update failure contract doc to match

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Exit 2 from ticket-clarity-check.sh routes to Layer 2 (not Layer 3)
- [ ] Exit 1 routes to Layer 3 (unchanged)
- [ ] Contract doc at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-clarity-check-output.md updated
- [ ] Verify: grep 'Layer 2' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md shows exit-2 routing
